item.title: PlayStation Plus Monthly Games lineup for June 2026 announced
item.content:encoded:
• PS4
  • PS5

Grounded Fully Yoked Edition, Nickelodeon All Star Brawl 2, and Warhammer 40,000: Darktide.

Sony Interactive Entertainment has announced the June 2026 Monthly Games lineup for PlayStation Plus Essential subscribers. All titles will be available from June 2, 2026.

The full list of Monthly Games is as follows:

  • Grounded Fully Yoked Edition (PS5, PS4)
  • Nickelodeon All Star Brawl 2 (PS5, PS4) (not available in Korea)
  • Warhammer 40,000: Darktide (PS5)

EA Sports FC 26, which is currently available as part of the May 2026 Monthly Games lineup lineup, will also remain available through June 16. “The World’s Game” update will be available on June 4, which adds a new international tournament mode with 48 national teams and new authentic stadiums.

Sony Interactive Entertainment also announced that Destiny 2: Legacy Collection will join the June 2026 Game Catalog lineup for PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium subscribers. The full Game Catalog lineup will be announced in June.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/playstation-plus-monthly-games-lineup-for-june-2026-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
